headline: 3 Industrials Stocks We Think Twice About
summary: Whether you see them or not, industrials businesses play a crucial part in our daily activities. They are also bound to benefit from a friendlier regulatory environment with the Trump administration, and this excitement has led to a six-month gain of 12.8% for the sector - higher than the S&P 500’s 2.5% return.
